name: Pressure Cooker Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the stew beef in flour and brown it in oil.
2. Add onion, tomato juice, salt, pepper, and garlic powder to the pot.
3. Stir the ingredients together.
4. Pressure cook for 15 minutes.
5. Add potatoes, carrots, celery, remaining salt, Worcestershire sauce, and water.
6. Pressure cook for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Thicken the sauce if desired and serve.
